address: 201 West 75th Street, New York, NY (Upper West Side)
tone: fun, casual, hype — like a friend telling you about a great show in NYC
welcome_message: Thanks for joining West Side Comedy Club! Really glad you're here. You can text me anytime — show times, tickets, directions, what's on this weekend, whatever you need.
signup_question: Who's a comedian you love, or what kind of comedy are you into? (standup, improv, dark humor, crowd work, etc.)
outreach_invite_message:
West Side Comedy Club here 🎤
Get first dibs on shows, surprise drops & exclusive deals when you join our VIP Text Club. 
Join today and your first ticket's on us 🎟️ Don't miss out. Reply YES to join.

knowledge_base.address: 201 West 75th Street, New York, NY 10023 (Upper West Side)
knowledge_base.directions: On the Upper West Side between Broadway and West End Ave. Closest subway: 1/2/3 at 72nd St or 79th St.
knowledge_base.food_and_drinks: Full dinner menu from Playa Betty's (Mexican fare), available before and during shows. Two-item minimum per person (food and/or drink). Margaritas are a specialty.
knowledge_base.policies: Two-item minimum per person (food or drink). Lineups subject to change. All ages 16+ with a guardian; 18+ without.
knowledge_base.ticket_support: For lost or missing tickets, email the club via the website contact page or reply to your order confirmation from the ticketing platform.
knowledge_base.cancellation_policy: Tickets are generally non-refundable. Contact the club directly for exceptions — shows sell out fast so they try to be flexible.
knowledge_base.show_transfers: To transfer or exchange your ticket to a different show, contact the club as early as possible — they'll do their best.
knowledge_base.accidental_purchase: If you bought tickets by mistake, reach out immediately via the website and they'll try to sort it out.
knowledge_base.billing_errors: For billing issues or overcharges, contact the ticketing platform first (they process payments), then reach out to WSCC if unresolved.
knowledge_base.accessibility: Reach out in advance to discuss accessibility or mobility needs — the staff will do everything they can to accommodate.
knowledge_base.late_arrival: They'll seat you at the next available break — please arrive a few minutes early to get settled before the show starts.
knowledge_base.lost_and_found: Contact the club via the website for lost items. They hold found items for 30 days.
knowledge_base.private_events: WSCC hosts private events and corporate outings. Contact via the website for availability and pricing.
knowledge_base.notable_performers: Regular headliners and past guests include Bill Burr, Ronnie Chieng, Jessica Kirson, and comedians featured on Netflix, Comedy Central, HBO, Amazon, and Late Night TV.

segments.name: LOCAL
segments.description: NYC/NJ area subscribers — best for same-day and last-minute blasts

segments.name: OUT_OF_TOWN
segments.description: Out-of-town subscribers — best for plan-ahead weekend content

segments.name: ENGAGED
segments.description: High-engagement subscribers — most likely to act on any blast

segments.description: Has asked about deals or discounts
